creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Gleb Smirnoff <glebius@FreeBSD.org> -----

Date: Wed, 20 Nov 2013 10:11:58 +0400
From: Gleb Smirnoff <glebius@FreeBSD.org>
To: Tony Hain <tony@hain-global-consulting.com>
Cc: freebsd-bugs@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: misc/184010: FreeBSD 10.0-BETA3  sysctl -a dumps
User-Agent: Mutt/1.5.22 (2013-10-16)

On Tue, Nov 19, 2013 at 02:41:33PM -0800, Tony Hain wrote:
T> I tried to rebuild the ALPHA5 kernel, but after the svn update to 258356 it
T> is hanging on 
T> fatal error: 'yp.h' file not found     and there is nothing in the readme
T> about that file. 

Why ALPHA5? Just use BETA3 kernel and sumbit more information regarding
the crashdump, please.

-- 
Totus tuus, Glebius.
